text: Marina Vista by Emaar, Dubai Marina. 2BR apartments from AED 2,350,000 (1,150 sqft), sea views, 60/40 payment plan, handover Q4 2026.
Sobha Hartland II, Mohammed Bin Rashid City. 1BR from AED 1,300,000 (720 sqft) and 2BR from AED 1,950,000 (1,080 sqft), waterfront community, handover Q2 2027.
Binghatti Amber, Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC). Studios from AED 650,000 (400 sqft), 1BR from AED 950,000 (650 sqft), ready to move in, high rental yield area.
Damac Lagoons, Dubailand. 3BR townhouses from AED 2,100,000 (1,850 sqft), lagoon-themed community, 1% monthly payment plan, handover 2026.
Emaar Beachfront, Dubai Harbour. 1BR from AED 2,600,000 (750 sqft) with private beach access and marina views, handover Q1 2027.
Dubai Hills Estate by Emaar. 3BR villas from AED 5,400,000 (3,200 sqft), golf-course community, family-friendly with schools and parks, handover 2026.
